name: Mermaid Gantt — Clinical Trial Timeline
input: Create a Gantt chart showing a clinical trial timeline: Phase I (6 months), Phase II (12 months, starts after Phase I), Phase III (24 months, starts after Phase II), FDA Review (12 months, starts after Phase III), Post-Market Surveillance (ongoing, starts after FDA Review).
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Timeline/Gantt chart with sequential phases and duration indicators.

data.syntax:
gantt
    title Clinical Trial Timeline
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Phase I
    Safety & Dosage    :p1, 2024-01-01, 180d
    section Phase II
    Efficacy Testing   :p2, after p1, 365d
    section Phase III
    Large-Scale Trials :p3, after p2, 730d
    section Regulatory
    FDA Review         :p4, after p3, 365d
    section Post-Market
    Surveillance       :p5, after p4, 365d
data.caption: Clinical trial development timeline from Phase I through post-market surveillance
